# Ahmed Mrabet

> Data Scientist and Machine Learning Engineer specializing in Computer Vision and NLP.

## About

Ahmed Mrabet is a Data Scientist at Artefact, where he turns complex data into actionable insights. He holds a Master's in AI Engineering and specializes in Computer Vision and Natural Language Processing. Beyond AI, he brings strong foundations in software engineering, algorithms, and information theory.

## Expertise

- Machine Learning & Deep Learning
- Computer Vision
- Natural Language Processing (NLP)
- Data Science & Analytics
- Software Engineering
- Algorithms & Information Theory
- Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow
- MLOps & Model Deployment

## Publications

- "Enhanced AI-Powered Energy Management Diagnostics: Expert System Integration with LLM for Predictive Maintenance" — Published at ICSMAI'25, Springer (October 2025)

## Notable Achievements

- 1st Place Nationally, 2nd Internationally — BCG Platinion Hackathon (2023)
- Top 12 Nationally — International Mathematical Olympiad Preparation, Morocco (2019-2020)

## Projects

- Pronesis: Co-founded an AI-powered career platform helping users navigate career paths with personalized guidance and intelligent recommendations (https://pronesis.pro)

## Blog Topics

Ahmed writes about algorithms, optimization, information theory, data science, and machine learning. Notable articles include:
- "Solving Wordle With Computer Science" — applying information theory to the popular word game
- "Solving Travelling Salesman Problem With Variable Neighborhood Search" — optimization algorithms

## Contact

For collaborations, questions, or speaking opportunities, reach out via email at ahmedmrabet.00@gmail.com or connect on LinkedIn.
